name: Herb Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 2 cups rice flour, brown rice flour, dry milk, onion, sugar, rosemary, thyme, xanthan gum, yeast and salt.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, cheese, water and oil until well blended.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients; stir until just combined.
4. Stir in the remaining cup rice flour to form a stiff dough. Cover the bowl and let rest for 10 minutes.
5. Turn the dough onto a floured surface. Knead for 5 minutes, using only as much additional flour as needed to prevent sticking.
6. Divide the dough into 2 equal pieces. Shape each piece into one loaf.
7. Place the loaves in lightly greased loaf pans. Let rise in a warm place for 40 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
8. Cool completely on a wire rack.
Each slice provides:
131 calories
5 g. protein
6 g. fat
15 g. carbohydrate
0 g. dietary fiber
38 mg. cholesterol
175 mg. sodium
Source: Basic Rice Recipes for those with allergies
